summary: Intel blowout Q1 2026 earnings (Apr 23): revenue $13.58B vs $12.42B est, Data Center +22% YoY; stock gapped +24.89%, dragging entire semiconductor complex higher. AMD +42.57% YTD vs NVDA +7% YTD (though NVDA +20% in April). AMD reporting earnings soon. Biggest AI-chip threat to NVDA identified as custom silicon (in-house hyperscaler chips), not AMD/Intel/Broadcom. Nvidia Blackwell Ultra said to 'lead market by two generations.' NVDA maintains 18-24 month technology lead per analysts.
